children.name: p
children.textContent: Basketball at Riverside Park — 6 players ready, needs 4 more. Starting in ~15 min.

children.name: svg
children.svgString: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#9498B0" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-x" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M18 6 6 18"/><path d="m6 6 12 12"/></svg>

children.name: p
children.textContent: Tennis Court 3 at Eastside Club is now free. Typically stays open 45+ min on weekdays.

children.name: svg

children.name: p
children.textContent: Soccer field at Millbrook Park typically clears at 6:30 PM on weekday evenings.

children.name: p
children.textContent: Rain clearing by 5:45 PM — 2 hour dry window near Lincoln Park courts.

children.name: p
children.textContent: A 3-on-3 basketball run at your level is forming 0.7 mi away on Oak Ave Courts.
